rulings.Case Title: AARON MARTINEZ VS. TAKE-TWO INTERACTIVE SOFTWARE, INC., A DELAWARE et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, August 16, 2011, line 2. DEFENDANT TAKE-TWO INTERACTIVE SOFTWARE, INC'S MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant¿s Motion to Strike Portions of the Third Amended Complaint is granted in part and denied in part. The Motion is granted as to penalties for late payments alleged in the 5th cause of action. The Motion is denied as to the 7th cause of action. Damages for meals and breaks not received in restitution. Under Murphy v. Kenneth Cole Productions, Inc. (2007) 40 Cal.4th 1094, statutes should be liberally construed with an eye to protecting employees. However, waiting time penalties in the 7th cause of action shall be stricken. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL ESTRADA VS. DENNIS GOZA et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, August 16, 2011, line 4. DEFENDANTS DENNIS GOZA, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE, MARGARET GOZA, AS TRUSTEE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Defendant¿s Motion for Summary Judgment is granted. The Firefighter Rule precludes recovery for injuries as a direct consequence of responding to calls in the line of duty. The rule applies only to conduct which ¿necessitated the summoning of the firefighter; it does not apply to independent acts of misconduct committed after the officer arrives at the scene. Tilley v. Schulte (1999) 70 Cal.App.4th 79, 83. Notwithstanding the declarations presented by Plaintiff, Plaintiff has no evidence that raises a triable issue of fact as to whether the parapet wall would not have collapsed from the fire had there been an earlier entry. What would or would not have occurred had the firefighters been able to access the house earlier is highly speculative, does not deter from the fact that the Plaintiff¿s injures were a result of the fire, and renders Plaintiff¿s argument too attenuated to withstand summary judgment. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: GUARDIAN GROUP, INC. VS. SUSAN BALDINI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, August 16, 2011, line 4. PLAINTIFF GUARDIAN GROUP, INC'S Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment. Plaintiff's application for writ of attachment is denied. Plaintiff has not provided evidence that its claims arise out of services to defendant in trade, business or profession. Moreover, plaintiff has failed to file its amended complaint and cannot show it will prevail in this action without doing so. =(302/LMG)
